name: JSONPlaceholder
description: JSONPlaceholder is a free online REST API for developers who need a quick fake backend. Perfect for tutorials, testing new libraries, and sharing code examples. No setup required.
longDescription: JSONPlaceholder is the most popular fake REST API for developers. It provides 6 types of resources: Posts, Comments, Albums, Photos, Todos, and Users — each with full CRUD support (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE). No authentication, no rate limits, and no configuration. Just hit the endpoint and get data instantly.
affiliateText: Ready to replace the fake API with a real backend? Supabase offers a generous free tier.
